nodes.summary: Blue-masked leafbird（Chloropsis venusta）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Blue-masked leafbird。

nodes.name: Chloropsis
nodes.summary: Chloropsis（Chloropsis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10种鸟类，如Philippine leafbird、Lesser green leafbird、Blue-winged leafbird等10种鸟类。

nodes.name: Blue-masked leafbird
nodes.summary: The blue-masked leafbird (Chloropsis venusta) is a species of bird in the family Chloropseidae. It is endemic to humid montane forest in the western regions of the Indonesian island of Sumatra. Generally, it lives in areas from 600 to 1,500 m (1,969–4,921 ft) in elevation. It is the smallest species of leafbird. It is considered near threatened due to habitat loss. References External links Image at ADW
